a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Share of deaths registered with an ill-defined cause of death, 2022

Ill-defined causes of death are causes that are not specific or refer to symptoms rather than an
underlying

cause
. The total number of deaths is estimated using data from household surveys and censuses.

Note: All deaths in a country may not have been registered with a
cause of death
.
